## Research contract

- [ ] Manifest and schema compatibility is preserved or documented.
- [ ] Dataset split usage prevents leakage and preserves final-holdout isolation.
- [ ] Strategy behavior golden coverage was run when a supported strategy changed.
- [ ] Artifact or hash contract changes are documented.

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests run (list commands).
- [ ] Full suite needed: yes/no; if yes, report the result.
- [ ] No repository-internal research artifact was introduced.
